sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT id, arrayPartialShuffle(values, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE id != 1)) AS shuffled_values FROM test_table WHERE id != ALL (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE id = 1);
SELECT id, arrayPartialShuffle(values, 3) AS partial_shuffled FROM test_table WHERE 3 != ALL (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE id <= 2);
CREATE TABLE temp_table (temp_id Int32, temp_values Array(Int32) DEFAULT [1, 2, 3]);
SELECT temp_id, arrayPartialShuffle(temp_values, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_table)) AS shuffled_temp FROM temp_table WHERE temp_id != ALL (SELECT temp_id FROM temp_table WHERE temp_id = 1);
SELECT id, arrayPartialShuffle(values, 0) AS shuffled_values FROM test_table WHERE id != ALL (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE id > 2);
SELECT id, arrayPartialShuffle(values, (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table WHERE id < 2)) AS shuffled_values FROM test_table WHERE values != ALL (SELECT values FROM test_table WHERE id = 1);
CREATE TABLE another_table (another_id Int32, another_value String);
SELECT a.another_id, arrayPartialShuffle(a.another_value, 1) AS shuffled_value FROM another_table AS a WHERE a.another_id != ALL (SELECT another_id FROM another_table WHERE another_value = '20');
CREATE TABLE edge_table (edge_id Int32, edge_values Array(Int32) DEFAULT [null, null, 3]);
SELECT edge_id, arrayPartialShuffle(edge_values, 2) AS edge_shuffled FROM edge_table WHERE edge_id != ALL (SELECT edge_id FROM edge_table WHERE edge_values[1] IS NULL);
